title: Ascendency Rules v1
atAGlance: Ascendency is a parallel progression track unlocked in session one and advanced across four level bands from Awakened to Apex.
sageNotes: Most accounts trace modern Ascendency awakenings to crisis moments, when mortal limits split and a divine core answers pressure with power. Scholars in Kharad-Vul argue the spark resembles older heroic traditions, yet manifests as personal expression rather than inherited office. Across Vharos, people now track Ascendants as earlier ages tracked kings: by what changes when they arrive.
gameInformation: Use docs/campaign/ascendency-v1-rules.md and docs/campaign/ascendency-path-comparison.md as the canonical web docs. Keep damage boosts bounded, cap repeated control loops, and apply faction clocks whenever spark conflict escalates political pressure.
